executives.name: Paul Mann
executives.background: Mr. Mann has served as our Chairman and Chief Executive Officer since September 2021. He has over 20 years of experience in the financial industry and has held various senior positions at investment banks and hedge funds.

executives.name: Bob Hassel
executives.background: Mr. Van Hassel has served as our Chief Financial Officer since September 2021. He has over 30 years of experience in finance and accounting, having served in various leadership roles at public and private companies.

executives.name: Hendrik Strydom
executives.background: Dr. Strydom has served as our Chief Technology Officer since September 2021. He is a nuclear physicist with extensive experience in isotope separation and enrichment technologies.

board_of_directors.name: Paul Mann
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Mann has served as our Chairman and Chief Executive Officer since September 2021.

board_of_directors.name: Duncan Moore
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Moore has served as a director since September 2021. He is a partner at East West Capital Partners and has extensive experience in the healthcare and life sciences sectors.

board_of_directors.name: Josh Mailman
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Mailman has served as a director since September 2021. He is an experienced investor and advocate for nuclear medicine and molecular imaging.

board_of_directors.name: Todd Wider
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Wider has served as a director since September 2021. He is a surgeon and an Emmy and Academy Award-winning documentary film producer.

sources.source_description: ASP Isotopes Inc. Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2023
